resources.string: Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
Already have an account? Sign In
The easiest and most professional point of sale system\nto manage your store efficiently
Add products easily with barcode scanning\nand monitor stock with smart alerts
Quick point of sale with invoice printing\nand professional customer management
Get clear insights on your store performance\nwith detailed reports and smart analytics
Add your first customer to get started
Add your first supplier to get started
Switch between light and dark themes
Apply tax to all outgoing invoices
Enable custom features based on your region
Enable automatic data backup to prevent data loss
Alert when products reach minimum stock level
Alert for customer payment collection dates
Automatically print invoice after each sale
The app will restart to apply the new language
Password must be at least 6 characters
Camera permission is needed for barcode scanning
Storage permission is needed for backup
Bluetooth permission is needed for printing
Camera permission must be granted to continue
Storage permission must be granted to continue
Are you sure you want to delete?
Are you sure you want to delete?
Do you want to exit the app?
This feature is under development and will be available soon
Are you sure you want to delete this item?
Are you sure you want to logout?

Cashier POS

Version: 2.0.0

Professional Point of Sale System

© 2026 All Rights Reserved
App must restart to apply changes
Quantity must be greater than zero
Do you want to complete the sale?
Please install a barcode scanner app
Printer not connected or error occurred
Add products to start a sale
Unlock all features: cloud backup, advanced reports, multi-store
Enjoying SmartPOS? Rate us on Google Play!
Swipe left to delete, right to edit
We\'ll set up currency and tax rates for you
You can change this later from Settings

This feature is available to SmartPOS Premium subscribers.

✓ Returns and exchanges
✓ Shift and cash drawer management
✓ Customer and supplier debt management
✓ Purchase orders from suppliers
✓ Cloud backup
✓ Unlimited reports

Subscribe now for 99 EGP / month
You\'ve reached the free limit (%1$d products).\n\nSubscribe to Premium for unlimited products.
You\'ve reached the free limit (%1$d customers).\n\nSubscribe to Premium for unlimited customers.
Swipe left to delete, right to edit
Delete all invoices? This cannot be undone.
All data will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
USB printing isn\'t available in this version.\nPlease use Bluetooth for now.
Bluetooth is not supported on this device
The app needs Bluetooth permissions to search for printers\n\nGrant permissions now?
Bluetooth must be enabled to use a Bluetooth printer\n\nChoose an option:
Enable Bluetooth then return to the app
WiFi must be enabled and connected to the same network as the printer
Enable WiFi then return to the app
Printer not checked yet!\n\nTap \'Check Printer\' first
Manage store branches and storage locations
Enter the amount of cash in the drawer at the end of the shift
Order receipt confirmed and inventory updated
Confirm receipt of this order and add the quantities to inventory?
Open a new shift to start recording sales
Enter the amount of cash in the drawer at the start of the shift
Failed to open shift, please try again
Failed to close shift, please try again
Don’t have an account? Sign up
Create a backup of your data\nto keep your information safe
• Backups are saved to: SmartPOS_Backups\n• Restoring a backup will delete current data\n• Keep regular backups of your data
Point the camera at the code
Add a cash drawer to track cash and transactions
Add your first check to track your payments
All customers have settled their debts
Products that have reached the reorder threshold
Not sold in the last 30 days
Lowest profit margin over the last 30 days
All products are in good condition
Record your first installment to track payments
Automatically print the invoice after sale

• Tap 'Test Printer' to check the connection
• Make sure the printer is powered on before testing
• For Bluetooth: pair with the printer first from device settings
• For Wi-Fi: make sure you’re connected to the same network
Start by adding a new product
Tap + to add a new purchase order
Select an invoice to process a return
Add sales first, then you can return them from here
Set a PIN code to protect access
Add users to control access permissions
Save a copy of the database to protect your data
⚠ Make sure to keep the backup in a safe place
Safe daily backup of your data
A complete point-of-sale system to manage your store easily and professionally
Do you want to edit or delete this product?
Manage your store easily and quickly
Record your expenses to track costs accurately
Add your products to start selling
Mark %1$d products as reviewed? They will be hidden from this dashboard.
Convert quote %1$s into a new sale? The quote will be marked as converted.
No previous sales for this product.
No sales in the selected period
No data for the selected period
